mapper.insert: INSERT INTO federated_billing_rule (rule_name, billing_type, apply_resource_ids, apply_organ_ids, base_fee, min_charge, is_active, effective_from, effective_to, price_per_query, enable_discount, discount_threshold, discount_rate, price_per_hit, enable_tiered, tiered_pricing, dedup_time_window, price_per_unique, repeat_discount, rolling_window_hours, slide_interval_hours, rolling_price_per_unique, rolling_repeat_discount, created_by) VALUES (#{ruleName}, #{billingType}, #{applyResourceIds}, #{applyOrganIds}, #{baseFee}, #{minCharge}, #{isActive}, #{effectiveFrom}, #{effectiveTo}, #{pricePerQuery}, #{enableDiscount}, #{discountThreshold}, #{discountRate}, #{pricePerHit}, #{enableTiered}, #{tieredPricing}, #{dedupTimeWindow}, #{pricePerUnique}, #{repeatDiscount}, #{rollingWindowHours}, #{slideIntervalHours}, #{rollingPricePerUnique}, #{rollingRepeatDiscount}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE federated_billing_rule SET is_active = #{isActive} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM federated_billing_rule WHERE is_active = 1 AND (effective_from IS NULL OR effective_from <= NOW()) AND (effective_to IS NULL OR effective_to >= NOW())
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO federated_billing_record (rule_id, task_type, task_id, requester_organ_id, provider_organ_id, resource_ids, billing_type, query_count, hit_count, dedup_key, dedup_window_start, dedup_window_end, unit_price, discount_rate_applied, total_charge, charge_status, billing_time, remark) VALUES (#{ruleId}, #{taskType}, #{taskId}, #{requesterOrganId}, #{providerOrganId}, #{resourceIds}, #{billingType}, #{queryCount}, #{hitCount}, #{dedupKey}, #{dedupWindowStart}, #{dedupWindowEnd}, #{unitPrice}, #{discountRateApplied}, #{totalCharge}, 0, NOW(), #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM federated_billing_record WHERE dedup_key = #{dedupKey} AND billing_time >= #{after}
